_doc: MORPHO unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/morpho. 59.20% unlocked / 40.80% locked × 1b = 408m MORPHO still locked. DL shows linear vest through Nov 2031 across Founders, Strategic Partners, Users & Distributors, Contributors, Market Makers. Only one explicit event visible: Nov 20 2026 cliff $2.04m / 1m MORPHO to Market Makers.

events.note: Single explicit DL event card. Market Makers low-sell-prob bucket so material impact modest.
Founders 15.20% × 1b = 152m MORPHO over ~7y linear per chart end date 2031.
